step_by_step_thinking:
Answer:

The Ashley-Howe model analyzes the transverse dimensions of the maxilla and mandible, particularly focusing on their relative positions and growth patterns. It specifically assesses the basilar (basal) transverse relationships between the upper and lower dental arches during development.

Answer: C: Basal bone-transverse relationship
